title: SlackClient.post_message() has no response body size cap
description: SlackClient::post_message() calls resp.json().await with no body size limit — an oversized or adversarial response from Slack API (or a MITM/proxy) would buffer unboundedly into heap before serde_json parses it, enabling OOM; bridge-jmap already has nie-kef6.79 for the same pattern in JmapClient
